record.field: Repair - Customer Letter
{{ object.display_name }}
{{ (object.partner_email if not object.sudo().partner_id.email or object.sudo().partner_id.email != object.partner_email else '') }}

Customer Name:

Dear Sir/Madam,

We have pleasure in advising you that the pumping unit sent to us for repairs is now ready for collection. (IF THIS UNIT IS NOT COLLECTED WITHIN 2 WEEKS OF LETTER STORAGE CHARGE OF RS 15/- PER DAY WILL BE LEVIED.)

The balance due Rs. should be paid in cash prior to collection (IF PAYMENT IS MADE BY CHEQUE, THE PUMP CAN BE COLLECTED ONLY ON REALIZATION OF THE CHEQUE)

When calling to make final payment and collecting the pump our reservation deposit number and our machinery report number must be surrendered. (IF EITHER OR BOTH OF RECEIPTS ARE LOST, OT CANNOT BE SURRENDERED, AN AFFIDAVIT MUST BE SUBMITTED.)

If the pump is to be handed over to a representative, please send through him/her letter authorizing us to hand over the pump to him/her. His/her specimen signature and national identity card should be certified by you.

Assuring you of our best attention

Yours faithfully,
Repair - Final Notice
{{ object.display_name }}
{{ (object.partner_email if not object.sudo().partner_id.email or object.sudo().partner_id.email != object.partner_email else '') }}

Customer Name:

REPAIRS TO PUMP - FINAL NOTICE

Dear Sir/Madam,

We refer to the "CENTRIC" type pumping unit No repaired on the above references and job number. We note that you have not responded to our email dated and requesting you to collect same.

Since we are unable to store this pumping unit any longer, we must finally request you to make payment of Rs. in cash and remove same from our workshop within 2 weeks of this letter. (PLEASE NOTE THAT A STORAGE CHARGE OF RS 15/- PER DAY WILL BE LEVIED FROM IN ADDITION TO THE REPAIR CHARGE.)

When calling to make final payment and collecting the pump our reservation deposit receipt number must be surrendered. (OR BOTH OF THESE RECEIPTS ARE LOST, OR CANNOT BE SURRENDERED AN AFFIDAVIT MUST BE SUBMITTED.)

If the pump is to be handed over to a representative, please send through him a letter authorizing us to hand over the pump to him/her.

If the pump is not collected within 2 weeks of this letter, it will be considered to be abandoned and will be destroyed.

Yours faithfully,

Jinasena Ltd

Repairs Department
Repair - Final Notice - Estimated
{{ object.display_name }}
{{ (object.partner_email if not object.sudo().partner_id.email or object.sudo().partner_id.email != object.partner_email else '') }}

Customer Name:

CENTRIC PUMPS HANDED IN FOR REPAIRS - FINAL NOTICE

Dear Sir/Madam,

We refer to the "CENTRIC" type given to us for repairs and our quotation dated . It is noted with regret that you have not responded to this quotation to date. We now wish to inform you that this quotation is no longer valid and we are not in a position to store this pump in our stores.

Due to limited space we have, we must make an urgent request to you, to make necessary arrangements to collect same within 10 days of this e-mail, in which event, we shall not be responsible for this item after the stipulated time period.

When calling to collect same, please ensure to produce the repair receipt issued to you at the time the pump was handed over to us.

Yours faithfully,

Jinasena Ltd

Repairs Department
Repair - Final Notice - Scrappage
{{ object.display_name }}
{{ (object.partner_email if not object.sudo().partner_id.email or object.sudo().partner_id.email != object.partner_email else '') }}

Customer Name:

NOTICE OF SCRAPPAGE

Dear Sir/Madam,

We refer to the "CENTRIC" type water pump handed over to us on under the reference number and regret to note that in spite of ready for collection notices sent to you on , you have failed to respond positively.

We regret to note that you continue to ignore our notices and can only assume that you are no longer interested in this pump and accordingly we have scrapped this item.

Therefore, please be informed that we are no longer responsible for this item.

Yours faithfully,
Repair - Reminding Letter
{{ object.display_name }}
{{ (object.partner_email if not object.sudo().partner_id.email or object.sudo().partner_id.email != object.partner_email else '') }}

Customer Name:

REMINDER

Dear Sir/Madam,

We refer to the "CENTRIC" type pumping unit No repaired on the above references and job number. We note that you have not responded to our letter dated and requesting you to collect same.

Due to limited space for holding "Awaiting collection pumps" in Colombo, we must take an urgent request to you to make necessary arrangements to collect same from our repair department at Colombo.

When calling to collect please ensure that you have all necessary documents including the repair receipt issued to you at the time the pump was handed over to us.

In the event that the pump is not collected within 10 days of this letter we will be transferring this pump to our warehouse in Ekala and the pump can only be collected by you from our warehouse after making payment (if any) at our Colombo office.

To avoid the resultant inconvenience to you, please ensure you pay close attention to this communication.

Yours faithfully,

Jinasena Ltd

Repairs Department
